name: lemniscus
description: Local health data MCP server — search, summarize, and explore Apple Health, Oura, Garmin, labs, and more. All data stays on your machine.

data_directory.title: Health Data Folder
data_directory.description: Folder containing your health data files (Apple Health export.xml, Oura/Garmin JSON, PDFs, images, etc.)

tools.name: retrieve_health_context
tools.description: Search all health data, documents, and photos using natural language

tools.name: get_health_summary
tools.description: Pre-aggregated health statistics grouped by month or year

tools.name: browse_timeline
tools.description: Chronological daily summaries of health data and documents

tools.name: query_health_readings
tools.description: Individual sensor readings — the most granular level

tools.name: list_sources
tools.description: List all available health data sources with record counts

tools.name: get_vault_file
tools.description: Retrieve the original file content for a source (image, PDF, text)

tools.name: reindex
tools.description: Re-scan data folder and index any new or modified files

tools.name: index_status
tools.description: Show what health data has been indexed and is available for search
